meta.description: CareStream pipeline stage transition rules. Concurrent-stages model — see plan/stage-rules-overhaul. Patient `current_stage` is the primary location; companion flags on Referrals (in_clinical_review, eligibility_completed_at, etc.) express concurrent presence in supportive modules (Clinical RN, Authorization Pending, Disenrollment Required) without changing current_stage.

Lead Entry.description: Raw referral captured. Owner must be assigned on promotion to Intake.

Discarded Leads.description: Lead was reviewed and discarded. Requires a reason and explanation. Can be restored to Leads.

Intake.description: Demographics, triage, F2F/MD orders, cursory review, and insurance details collection. Completing the cursory review and pushing to Clinical RN moves the patient to Clinical Intake RN Review (it leaves Intake). Eligibility is completed concurrently from the patient drawer.

Eligibility Verification.description: Parent module for insurance / eligibility. Authorization Pending and Disenrollment Required are supportive side workflows — the patient stays here while those are in flight.

Disenrollment Required.description: Supportive sub-module of Eligibility. Patient remains in Eligibility throughout; this module is the work queue for disenrollment specialists.
Disenrollment Required.destinationPrompt: Describe what disenrollment assistance is needed (which agency, services, contact made, expected timing).

F2F/MD Orders Pending.description: Sub-state of Intake. Awaiting valid face-to-face documentation and physician orders.

Clinical Intake RN Review.protectedExitMessage: Only the clinical intake RN can move a patient out of Clinical RN Review. Issues should be escalated to Conflict — there is no Decline action.
Clinical Intake RN Review.description: Clinical RN reviews skilled need, safety, ICD-10. Accept → Confirm flips the patient to Staffing Feasibility (LIFO with Eligibility). Send Back to F2F is also available; Decline does not exist — escalate to Conflict instead.

Authorization Pending.description: Supportive sub-module of Eligibility. Patient remains in Eligibility throughout; this module is the work queue for prior-auth specialists.

Conflict.description: Escalation lane. On creation, source_stage is captured so 'Resolve & Return to Source' knows where to send the patient back. Resolution always requires a note.

Staffing Feasibility.patientContactNote: Patient or parent must be contacted before moving forward from Staffing Feasibility.
Staffing Feasibility.description: Operational availability check. Patient lands here once both Clinical RN Confirm and Eligibility Completed are recorded.

Admin Confirmation.protectedExitMessage: Admin Confirmation accept/decline is a protected action requiring Admin scope.
Admin Confirmation.description: Side-channel NTUC review gate. Reached only via NTUC requests from non-direct users. Admin can deny the NTUC request and bounce the referral back to its origin stage.

Pre-SOC.description: Case formally accepted. Clinician assigned, documentation confirmed. SOC scheduling and completion happen here.

SOC Scheduled.description: Legacy stage — kept for historical records. The new forward path is Pre-SOC → SOC Completed; SOC Scheduled is no longer a primary destination.

SOC Completed.description: SOC performed and documented. Patient transferred to HCHB. CareStream pipeline ends here.

Hold.description: Temporarily paused. Requires hold reason, owner, and expected resolution date.

NTUC.description: Not taken under care. Terminal. Requires structured NTUC reason and financial impact tag.

OPWDD Enrollment.description: Special Needs referral routed for OPWDD enrollment when Code 95 = No. Specialist handles enrollment; patient re-enters via Intake when the case closes.
